'''鈭歳-j-sh-k''' ('''karajshekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lampshade|lampshade]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lampshade|lampshade]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-j-sh-k
|-
! Lemma
| karajshekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirajshekoko|thirajshekoko]] || [[word:jirajshekoko|jirajshekoko]] || [[word:shirajshekoko|shirajshekoko]] || [[word:kirajshekoko|kirajshekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurajshekoko|thuthurajshekoko]] || [[word:jujurajshekoko|jujurajshekoko]] || [[word:shushurajshekoko|shushurajshekoko]] || [[word:kukurajshekoko|kukurajshekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorajshekoko|thorajshekoko]] || [[word:jorajshekoko|jorajshekoko]] || [[word:shorajshekoko|shorajshekoko]] || [[word:korajshekoko|korajshekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rajshekoko|th忙rajshekoko]] || [[word:j忙rajshekoko|j忙rajshekoko]] || [[word:sh忙rajshekoko|sh忙rajshekoko]] || [[word:k忙rajshekoko|k忙rajshekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharajshekoko|thatharajshekoko]] || [[word:jajarajshekoko|jajarajshekoko]] || [[word:shasharajshekoko|shasharajshekoko]] || [[word:kakarajshekoko|kakarajshekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharajshekoko|tharajshekoko]] || [[word:jarajshekoko|jarajshekoko]] || [[word:sharajshekoko|sharajshekoko]] || [[word:karajshekoko|karajshekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharajshekoko|tharajshekoko]] || [[word:jarajshekoko|jarajshekoko]] || [[word:sharajshekoko|sharajshekoko]] || [[word:karajshekoko|karajshekoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
